description: CompositionWhite printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, round neck with a buttoned chets placket that has a hakoba lining and has hakoba lace on the shoulder straps and back neck FittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this printed white kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh in the hakoba work, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
